page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor. The system delivers 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz, with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration.

This instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads. It is suitable for hosting databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise applications, and data processing tasks that require substantial memory capacity without local storage dependencies.
